contentBlocks.original:
ॐ सर्वेषां स्वस्तिर्भवतु
सर्वेषां शान्तिर्भवतु
सर्वेषां पूर्णंभवतु
सर्वेषां मङ्गलंभवतु
ॐ शान्तिः शान्तिः शान्तिः
contentBlocks.transliteration:
oṃ sarveṣāṃ svastirbhavatu
sarveṣāṃ śāntirbhavatu
sarveṣāṃ pūrṇaṃbhavatu
sarveṣāṃ maṅgalaṃbhavatu
oṃ śāntiḥ śāntiḥ śāntiḥ
contentBlocks.translation: Oṃ, may there be well-being for all, may there be peace for all, may there be fulfilment for all, may there be auspiciousness for all. Oṃ, peace, peace, peace.
contentBlocks.meanings: ॐ (oṃ) – sacred sound; सर्वेषाम् (sarveṣām) – for all; स्वस्तिः (svastiḥ) – well-being; भवतु (bhavatu) – may it be; सर्वेषाम् (sarveṣām) – for all; शान्तिः (śāntiḥ) – peace; भवतु (bhavatu) – may it be; सर्वेषाम् (sarveṣām) – for all; पूर्णम् (pūrṇam) – fulfillment; भवतु (bhavatu) – may it be; सर्वेषाम् (sarveṣām) – for all; मङ्गलम् (maṅgalam) – auspiciousness; भवतु (bhavatu) – may it be; ॐ (oṃ) – sacred sound; शान्तिः (śāntiḥ) – peace; शान्तिः (śāntiḥ) – peace; शान्तिः (śāntiḥ) – peace;
